_doc: Focus roster for steward-focus.yml (hourly scheduler). Set enabled:true to give an app its own recurring improve runs; everyHours controls cadence (1 = every hour, 2 = every other hour...). Different apps run in parallel (separate repos, per-app concurrency groups); the same app never overlaps itself. Edit this file from the GitHub UI, any Claude session, or (eventually) the Manager console — changes take effect on the next hourly tick, no workflow edits needed.
